description_long: This is a compact, rectangular air conditioner with a predominantly white body and a blue top panel. The front features a prominent air output grille with horizontal slats, and a visible brand logo below the grille. The top surface houses a control panel with several buttons and a display area, all set within the blue section. A power cord extends from the lower rear side, indicating its plug-in operation. The rear side has a secondary grille, likely for air intake or exhaust, composed of vertical and horizontal slats. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for portable or floor-standing use in urban environments.
description: A compact, white and blue floor-standing air conditioner with a front grille, top control panel, and rear vent. It features a modern, sleek design with a visible power cord.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main air output grille, brand logo, and the blue top with the control panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, unadorned surface and the visible power cord extending from the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the secondary grille for air intake or exhaust and the cord exiting from the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a clear look at the blue top and the cord trailing away.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, dark logo is visible on the front face below the grille, centrally placed and rectangular in shape.
attribute_grille_pattern: The front grille consists of horizontal slats with moderate spacing, while the rear grille features a grid of vertical and horizontal slats forming a rectangular mesh.
attribute_control_panel_location: Top front, integrated into the blue section.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: A single large rectangular vent with a grid pattern is located on the rear, likely serving as the exhaust; it features both vertical and horizontal slats.
